name: Get Zip Code Stats for MSAs

content.query:
SELECT [ZipCode]
,[Population]
,CAST([PopulationEstimate] as INT) as [PopulationEstimate]
,[State]
,[MSA_Name]
,[County]
,[City]
,[HouseholdsPerZipCode]
,[SFDU]
,[DeliveryResidential]
,[AverageHouseValue]
,[IncomePerHousehold]
,[MedianAge]
,[WhitePopulation]
,[BlackPopulation]
,[HispanicPopulation]
,[AsianPopulation]
,[HawaiianPopulation]
,[IndianPopulation]
,[OtherPopulation]
,[MalePopulation]
,[FemalePopulation]
,[PersonsPerHousehold]
,[MedianAgeMale]
,[MedianAgeFemale]
,[Latitude]
,[Longitude]
,[Elevation]
,[StateFullName]
,[CityType]
,[CityAliasAbbreviation]
,[AreaCode]
,[CityAliasName]
,[CountyFIPS]
,[StateFIPS]
,[TimeZone]
,[DayLightSaving]
,[MSA]
,[PMSA]
,[CSA]
,[CBSA]
,[CBSA_Div]
,[CBSA_Type]
,[CBSA_Name]
,[PMSA_Name]
,[Region]
,[Division]
,[MailingName]
,[NumberOfBusinesses]
,[NumberOfEmployees]
,[BusinessFirstQuarterPayroll]
,[BusinessAnnualPayroll]
,[BusinessEmploymentFlag]
,[GrowthRank]
,[GrowingCountiesA]
,[GrowingCountiesB]
,[GrowthIncreaseNumber]
,[GrowthIncreasePercentage]
,[CBSAPopulation]
,[CBSADivisionPopulation]
,[CongressionalDistrict]
,[CongressionalLandArea]

,[DeliveryBusiness]
,[DeliveryTotal]
,[PreferredLastLineKey]
,[ClassificationCode]
,[MultiCounty]
,[CSAName]
,[CBSA_Div_Name]
,[CityStateKey]
,[LandArea]
,[WaterArea]
,[CityAliasCode]
,[CityMixedCase]
,[CityAliasMixedCase]
,[BoxCount]
,[MFDU]
,[StateANSI]
,[CountyANSI]
,[ZIPIntroDate]
,[AliasIntroDate]
,[FacilityCode]
,[CityDeliveryIndicator]
,[CarrierRouteRateSortation]
,[FinanceNumber]
,[UniqueZIPName]
,[SSAStateCountyCode]
,[MedicareCBSACode]
,[MedicareCBSAName]
,[MedicareCBSAType]
,[MarketRatingAreaID]
,[CountyMixedCase]
 FROM [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS]
 where 
 PrimaryRecord = 'P'
 and MSA_NAME in ('Peoria-Pekin IL MSA', 'Champaign-Urbana IL MSA', 'Springfield IL MSA', 'Decatur IL MSA')
 order by 
 [PopulationEstimate] desc
